business.name: Atlas
business.industry: SaaS — knowledge base for support teams
business.description: Atlas keeps every answer in one place, so support agents resolve tickets in minutes and customers help themselves.

audience: Support and CX leaders at growing software companies.

brand.voice: Explain plainly. Lead with the outcome.

content.headline: Every answer, one search away
content.valueProposition: Atlas turns your scattered docs and past tickets into one searchable source of truth — so agents resolve faster and customers self-serve.

features.title: Instant search
features.body: Answers surface as agents type — across docs, macros, and past tickets.

features.title: Suggested replies
features.body: Atlas drafts a reply from your own content, ready to send.

features.title: Gap reports
features.body: See what customers ask that you have not answered — and fix it.

features.title: Secure by default
features.body: SOC 2, SSO, and granular permissions on every plan.

testimonials.quote: Our ticket volume dropped by a third in the first quarter. Atlas paid for itself in weeks.
testimonials.author: Priya Menon

testimonials.quote: Agents actually trust the suggestions — because they come from our own docs.
testimonials.author: Tom Alvarez

faqs.question: How long does setup take?
faqs.answer: Most teams import their docs and see live search within an afternoon.

faqs.question: Does it work with our helpdesk?
faqs.answer: Atlas connects to Zendesk, Intercom, and Freshdesk out of the box.

faqs.question: Is our data secure?
faqs.answer: Atlas is SOC 2 Type II certified, with SSO and role-based access on every plan.
